unique_vulnerabilities.name: Reentrancy in withdrawAll()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: These findings describe the external call on line 18 followed by state access on line 20, which is a reentrancy pattern. Slither and Mythril agree on the vulnerability type.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Transaction Order Dependence in withdrawAll()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding describes a race condition vulnerability related to transaction order dependence, which is distinct from reentrancy.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity Version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings highlight the use of an outdated Solidity version, which is unrelated to the other vulnerabilities.
